name: Mammon | Wedding Vows Obey Me💛
description:
MC has decided to take on the role of modeling for a wedding magazine special, and suddenly all of the brothers are participating, saying "it's nothing, really." when they're just jealous of somebody else being shown with MC.

Diavolo helps by hosting/organizing the auditions, which is where each brother will whip out a proposal to MC. Each brother will give MC their own proposal, ranging from extremely over-dramatic to shy little puppy's confessing their love and devotion. All with the same goal, of being chosen as MC's groom.

1/7 Characters made for the Obey Me! Wedding Vows series.

💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛

Little disclaimer!

I am not in control of your story or how it goes. I'm only here to make the bots, fulfill your fantasies, and make you guys happy. If the bot starts speaking for you, click the next arrow to make another message. Anything inappropriate in the comments and I will delete, I don't want any freaky business hidden there, this is your warning for any of you weirdos looking at this message. I will try to make it so the bot doesn't get weird/freaky deaky in the first few messages unless you guys want that...- 🙁👎

💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛

More About the Story!

This is an Obey Me bot for anyone wondering and this is an event from the game called "Wedding Vows" from like 2020. Yes, Obey Me is reviving it on their YouTube page go check them out!!

This story is based around the Wedding Vows event and mainly about Mammon (for any of you Mammon lovers).

💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛

DO NOT FRET DEAR SHEEPS!!

I am in the process of making the other brothers and I will have a bot page where you guys can vote on what characters/bots for me to make next in the comments every 1-2 weeks. Feel free to request bots there, I will be looking at the top 5 comments on there and the following day of that pole ending I will hold another voting poll for you guys to vote which of the top 5 I should make.

The poles will end after about a week, if I'm too tired or busy I will hold them out for longer (maybe even another week for you guys to request/decide)

💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛💛

Have fun!! 💙💛🧡💚🩷❤️💜
